summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Shifts tab in CaregiverDashboard. Found and fixed 1 critical bug (filteredHistory undefined). All 13 features from test requirements verified successfully: Shift Status card (On/Off shift states, Clock In/Out times, Weekly Hours, Clock buttons), Active Client selector, Client List modal with 3 clients, Quick Actions card, and Shift History sub-page with filter tabs.
passed_tests: Shifts tab navigation - clicking nav-shift tab shows Shifts content
Shift Status card displays correctly in 'On Shift' state (green dot, 'On Shift' text, Clock Out button is red)
Clock Out button click: changes state to Off Shift, shows red dot with 'Off Shift' text, shows 'Clocked Out' alert dialog, changes button to green 'Clock In', shows clock out time
Clock In button click: changes state to On Shift, shows green dot with 'On Shift' text, shows 'Clocked In' alert with GPS message, changes button to red 'Clock Out'
Alert dialog OK button dismisses the dialog
Active Client selector shows 'ACTIVE CLIENT' label and client name with chevron down
Clicking Active Client opens 'Your Clients' modal with 3 clients
Client cards show avatar icon, name, condition, tasks count, and risk level badge (MODERATE/HIGH/LOW)
Active client (David Smith) has green border and green checkmark icon
Selecting different client (Margaret Johnson) closes modal and updates Active Client name
Quick Actions card shows 'View Earnings' and 'Shift History' with correct emojis and chevrons
Client list modal X button closes the modal
Shift History sub-page loads and shows history cards with filter tabs (All/Completed/Cancelled)

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: filteredHistory is not defined at line 543 in renderShiftContent
bugs_fixed.fix: Added filteredHistory computed variable before renderShiftContent function that filters SHIFT_HISTORY based on historyFilter state

mocked_apis_list: All client/shift/vitals data comes from mockData.js
CLIENTS array with 3 clients: David Smith, Margaret Johnson, Robert Williams
No backend API calls - all data is local state

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shifts tab fully tested. Key data-testids: nav-shift (tab), shift-status-card, clock-btn, active-client-selector, quick-actions-card, view-earnings-btn, shift-history-btn, clock-alert-modal, clock-alert-ok-btn, client-list-modal, close-client-list-btn, client-card-{1|2|3}. Login flow: Desktop 1200px > nav-login-btn > 'I'm a Caregiver' > fill email/password > Sign In > switch to mobile 430px > click nav-shift via JS. App starts in 'On Shift' mode due to skipStartShift=true prop.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: The renderShiftContent function used filteredHistory variable on line 543 but it was never defined. The historyFilter state existed but the actual filtering logic to create filteredHistory from SHIFT_HISTORY was missing.
rca_of_issue.reproduction_steps: 1. Login as caregiver 2. Navigate to Shifts tab 3. Click 'Shift History' quick action -> Runtime error appeared
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Added filteredHistory computed variable that filters SHIFT_HISTORY based on historyFilter state value ('all', 'completed', 'cancelled')
